title: Statistical terms: descriptive statistics
body_html:
The table below gives a brief definition of commonly encountered terms:

TermDescription
MeanThe average of a series of observed values
MedianThe middle value if series of observed values are placed in order
ModeThe value that occurs most frequently within a dataset
RangeThe difference between the largest and smallest observed value
